nasb.text: Then they took all the goods of Sodom and Gomorrah and all their food supply, and departed.

esv.text: So the enemy took all the possessions of Sodom and Gomorrah, and all their provisions, and went their way.

cnv.text: 四王就把所多瑪和蛾摩拉所有的財物，以及一切糧食都拿走，

ccb.text: 四王把所多玛和蛾摩拉所有的财物和粮食洗劫一空，

csbs.text: 那四王把所多玛和格摩拉一切的财物以及他们所有的食物都掳掠而去。
